title: Gem Resource Pack
description: Bliss SMP gem as Item replacing amethyst shard made by me from scratch.
body:
I wanted to make a resourcepack that mimicked the gems used in Bliss SMP cause they're pretty :) |
It replaces the amethyst shard with a pink Bliss SMP styled gem :D |
Not sure if i will update this maybe in the future with a specific name item. | It should be positioned exactly like Bliss i spend around 2 hours to get it exactly right.
